calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-09-2021 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff/Respondent Fred Carson appeared.
Mr. Carson filed a declaration correcting the spelling of his name.
No appearance on behalf of Defendant/Appellant State Farm Insurance.
This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Party sworn.
Plaintiff/Respondent Fred Carson testified on his own behalf.
The matter is affirmed. Judgement is ordered in favor of Plaintiff/Respondent Fred Carson and against Appellant/Defendant State Farm Insurance in the amount of $7260 principal plus $90 costs for a total of $7350.
Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Not reported. (306)
